pick_title: Pick a Drive folder via Google Picker
banner_reuse_folder: Reusing existing folder "{name}". Screenshots will upload here.
banner_picker_opened: Picker opened in a new tab. Re-open this popup after selecting a folder.
err_capture_restricted: Cannot capture this page. Try a normal web page.
create_folder_title: Create a new folder in your Drive root
pick_existing_title: Pick an existing folder from Google Drive
folder_help: Use Pick existing… to grant access to a folder you already have, or Create folder to make a new root folder (drive.file scope). Sub-folders are created automatically by week when auto-upload is enabled.
filename_use_domain: Use site domain as file name prefix
filename_hint_prefix: Your username or any custom prefix. Example: {example}
filename_hint_domain: Uses the active tab hostname. Example: {example}
filename_postfix_hint: Postfix part of the file name. Example suffix: {example}
screenshot_mode_hint: Captures the full loaded page height. Infinite-scroll pages capture only content loaded so far.
max_page_height_hint: Cap for full-page captures to prevent huge images on infinite-scroll pages. Range 1,000–32,000 px.
err_max_page_height_range: Maximum height must be between 1,000 and 32,000.
status_picker_opened: Picker opened in a new tab…
err_pick_or_create: Pick an existing folder or click "Create folder" first.
err_folder_inaccessible: Folder is no longer accessible to this extension. Click "Create folder" to create a new one.
prompt_create_folder: Name for the new Google Drive folder:
err_auth_needed: Sign in to Google Drive to upload.
notify_rescope: Drive permission was tightened to drive.file. Please re-pick a folder in settings.
